meta_title: For Founders: passive income to Solve no project ideas (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome no project ideas. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Passive Income to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop searching for ideas. Learn how to build passive income SaaS products using Antigravity and Claude Code to solve your project inertia today.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for the 'perfect' idea. Passive income is a byproduct of solving high-friction, low-complexity problems for specific niches. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative development, you can ship micro-SaaS products that generate revenue while you sleep, effectively bypassing the 'no idea' trap.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You’ve got the technical stack, the drive, and the capital, but you're paralyzed by the 'idea drought.' You’re looking for a unicorn, but the market is begging for simple, automated solutions that save them time or make them money. This is where most founders stall, trapped in a cycle of analysis paralysis.

The secret isn't a flash of genius; it's engineering a systematic approach to market demand. By treating product development as a data-driven process—where you validate demand before writing a single line of business logic—you turn the 'no ideas' problem into a repeatable, passive income engine. Let’s build your first revenue-generating asset.

steps.title: Niche Market Identification
steps.description: Scan high-traffic subreddits and API marketplaces for recurring 'how to' questions. Focus on manual tasks that can be automated.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the following list of manual tasks: [Insert List]. Identify which three have the highest potential for a subscription-based micro-SaaS model based on recurring user pain.

steps.title: Rapid Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the boilerplate for a secure, database-backed authentication and payment flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Next.js 14 project boilerplate with Supabase integration, Stripe subscription management, and a clean Tailwind dashboard structure.

steps.title: Logic Implementation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to build the core engine that automates the specific task identified in step one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a robust backend function that triggers an AI analysis of user-uploaded CSV files, returning an actionable insights report.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit 'Implement core data processing logic'

steps.title: Payment Integration
steps.description: Connect Stripe webhooks to your user dashboard to ensure your service is gated behind a subscription.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer that verifies Stripe subscription status via webhook events and updates the user's access level in the Supabase DB.

steps.title: Deployment & Monitoring
steps.description: Ship to production and set up automated error tracking to ensure 24/7 uptime for your passive income stream.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a production-ready CI/CD pipeline for Vercel deployment with automated environment variable injection.

pro_tips: Focus on 'Boring' SaaS: The most profitable products solve unsexy problems like data formatting or tax compliance.
Build for APIs: If you can wrap an existing API in a beautiful UI, you have a product.
The 24-Hour Rule: If you can't build the MVP in 24 hours, the scope is too large; simplify until it is.
Automate Support: Use Claude to write an automated FAQ and troubleshooting bot before you even launch.
Pre-sell before building: Post your landing page on Twitter/X and see if anyone clicks 'Buy' before you finish the code.
content.next_steps: After deploying, implement an automated email drip sequence to nurture users, then move to your next micro-SaaS idea using the same scaffold.
content.conversion_block: Don't let another day pass without a revenue-generating asset in your portfolio. You have the tools, the blueprint, and the expertise to dominate your niche. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
